# Replication Data for: C. elegans homeobox gene network benchmark

Authors: Gosztolai, Adam
Published: 2021-06-28T15:04:36Z
Subjects: Mathematical Sciences, Physics
DOI: doi:10.7910/DVN/XZD8Q0

Benchmarking geometric clustering against other methods on the C. elegans homeobox gene regulatory network of Reilly, M. B., Cros, C., Varol, E., Yemini, E., & Hobert, O. (2020). Unique homeobox codes delineate all the neuron classes of C. elegans. Nature, 584(7822), 1–24 (2021-06-28)

Citation: Gosztolai, Adam, 2021, "Replication Data for: C. elegans homeobox gene network benchmark", https://doi.org/10.7910/DVN/XZD8Q0, Harvard Dataverse, V1
